prose: Chlorpyrifos is called positive under the assay_mechanism_recovered tier because curated evidence converges independently: CTD flags Parkinson's DirectEvidence and it is a registered stressor on a neuro-AOP pathway [E1]. This curated convergence is the sole basis for the call. Mechanistically, the evidence-ranked hypothesis anchors the molecular initiating event in MitoCarta3.0 Complex-I Q-site subunits, with the adverse outcome expressed in the SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population identified by Kamath 2022 [E2]. Human epidemiology across organophosphate cohorts reports elevated PD associations, consistent with but not confirming this chain [E4], and structure-based prediction indicates brain-penetrance, lending CNS-exposure plausibility [E5]. The 42 ToxCast assay hits corroborate the illustrated chain only; they are anti-diagnostic and never a discriminator [E3]. Taken together, this is a carefully-hedged mechanistic hypothesis, not a causal claim, resting on curated mechanism with assay and epidemiological support as corroboration.

citations.detail: Curated convergence: CTD Parkinson's DirectEvidence AND registered neuro-AOP stressor.
MIE grounded in MitoCarta Complex-I Q-site subunits; adverse outcome in the Kamath SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population.
42 mechanistic assay hits illustrate the chain (corroboration only — anti-diagnostic, not a discriminator).
